message:
fix(test): resolve 5 pre-existing test failures and Dolt panic (bd-iqsw6v)

- doctor_test: update version threshold (0.43→0.50) for 10-minor-version check
- hooks_test: read expected shim versions from templates instead of hardcoding v1
- info: add third v0.54.0 changelog entry (macOS netgo tag fix)
- init_test: accept "upstream" warning when bd init creates git repo in non-git dir
- main_test: use t.TempDir() to fix Dolt panic from premature os.RemoveAll cleanup
- completions_test: reset caches to prevent stale worktree state in flaky test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ import (
 	"time"
 
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
+	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/beads"
+	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/git"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/types"
 )
 
@@ -238,6 +240,14 @@ func TestCompleteCommandWorksWithoutDatabase(t *testing.T) {
 	store = nil
 	dbPath = ""
 
+	// Reset caches so FindDatabasePath won't use stale git worktree info
+	beads.ResetCaches()
+	git.ResetCaches()
+	defer func() {
+		beads.ResetCaches()
+		git.ResetCaches()
+	}()
+
 	// Change to temp directory (no database present)
 	originalWd, err := os.Getwd()
 	if err != nil {
